svg.title: Huffman Tree — final encoding tree
svg.desc: A complete Huffman tree built from 6 characters: E(15), A(10), T(8), N(6), S(5), R(4). Internal nodes show combined frequencies; leaf nodes show character and code.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the root frequency calculated in a Huffman tree?')
sendPrompt('Why does E get the shortest Huffman code?')
sendPrompt('What does this internal node represent?')
sendPrompt('How many bits does A use in this encoding?')
sendPrompt('What characters are under this node?')
sendPrompt('What is the Huffman code for T?')
sendPrompt('Which two characters are merged here?')
sendPrompt('What is the Huffman code for N?')
sendPrompt('What is the full code for S?')
sendPrompt('What is the full code for R?')
